prompts.name: aml_programme_workflow
prompts.description: Step-by-step workflow for assembling a complete AML programme using AINumbers browser tools (T110 > T116 > T119 > T131). Returns an orchestration guide; the full audited run is available at the AML Programme Composer.

arguments.name: entity_type
arguments.description: Type of entity (e.g. bank, EMI, VASP, MSB). Scopes risk-tier calibration.

arguments.name: jurisdiction
arguments.description: Primary regulatory jurisdiction (e.g. UK, EU, US). Scopes AML framework references.

arguments.name: synthetic_profile
arguments.description: Synthetic customer profile description for Step 1 risk rating (never real PII).

prompts.name: dora_readiness_workflow
prompts.description: Step-by-step DORA ICT readiness workflow: run the diagnostic triage, then the orchestrated composer (T300 > T304 > T307 > T310), export composite Policy Mandate.

arguments.name: entity_type
arguments.description: Type of financial entity (e.g. credit institution, payment institution, investment firm, insurance undertaking)

arguments.name: jurisdiction
arguments.description: Primary jurisdiction -- EU member state or "EU-wide"

prompts.name: pi_emi_authorisation_workflow
prompts.title: PI/EMI Authorisation — PSD2/PSRs Workflow
prompts.description: Walk a UK/EU fintech through the PI/EMI authorisation chain: FCA/EBA authorisation readiness, EMI capital requirements, PI own funds, PSP safeguarding, and PSR APP reimbursement liability.

prompts.name: crypto_tax_reporting_workflow
prompts.title: Crypto-Asset Tax Reporting Workflow (CARF / DAC8 / 1099-DA)
prompts.description: Walk a CASP or tax team through end-to-end crypto-asset tax reporting: CARF/DAC8 reportable classification, cost-basis and gain/loss calculation, IRS Form 1099-DA assembly, and CASP readiness scoring. Covers OECD CARF (52 jurisdictions, effective 1 Jan 2026), EU DAC8 (FY2026, first reports 31 Jan 2027), and US TD 9996 1099-DA (gross proceeds from 1 Jan 2025, basis from 1 Jan 2026). ⚠ US-CARF exchange not effective until 2027.

arguments.name: entity_type
arguments.description: Type of entity (e.g. CEX, DEX, custodian, brokerage, CASP). Scopes reportable obligations.

arguments.name: jurisdiction
arguments.description: Primary jurisdiction(s) (e.g. EU, UK, US, OECD). Determines which frameworks apply.

arguments.name: tax_year
arguments.description: Tax year under review (e.g. 2025, 2026). Affects 1099-DA good-faith relief and SBIE transitional rates.

prompts.name: bank_capital_liquidity_workflow
prompts.title: Bank Capital & Liquidity (Basel III) Workflow
prompts.description: Walk a bank treasury or capital team through the full Basel III capital and liquidity stack: RWA calculation, LCR, NSFR, leverage ratio, and Pillar 3 disclosure assembly. Covers BCBS 189 (capital), 238 (LCR), 295 (NSFR), 270/360 (leverage), 309/400 (Pillar 3).

arguments.name: bank_type
arguments.description: Type of institution (e.g. G-SIB, national bank, regional bank, branch). Affects G-SIB surcharge and buffer levels.

arguments.name: jurisdiction
arguments.description: Regulatory jurisdiction (e.g. EU CRR3, UK PRA, US Fed). Scopes applicable calibrations.

arguments.name: period
arguments.description: Reporting period (e.g. Q1 2026, FY2025). Used for Pillar 3 disclosure header.

prompts.name: pillar_two_globe_workflow
prompts.title: Pillar Two GloBE Minimum Tax Workflow
prompts.description: Walk a tax team through the OECD Pillar Two GloBE end-to-end workflow: effective tax rate by jurisdiction, top-up tax and QDMTT/IIR/UTPR allocation, transitional safe harbour eligibility, and GloBE Information Return (GIR) assembly. 15% global minimum ETR. ⚠ CRITICAL: US-headquartered MNE groups are EXEMPT from IIR and UTPR per the OECD January 2026 side-by-side package. Do NOT apply IIR/UTPR to US-parented groups. QDMTT exposure applies to all groups. First GIR filings due 30 June 2026.

arguments.name: parent_hq
arguments.description: Parent HQ jurisdiction ISO-3 (e.g. DE, GB, JP, US). If US, IIR/UTPR exemption applies.

arguments.name: fy
arguments.description: Fiscal year under analysis (e.g. 2024, 2025, 2026).

arguments.name: revenue_scope
arguments.description: Estimated consolidated revenue in €m (to confirm ≥ €750M GloBE scope).

prompts.name: mcp_server_audit_workflow
prompts.description: End-to-end MCP server audit: score readiness, lint tool definitions, scan for tool poisoning, audit OAuth. All server-side -- no browser required.

arguments.name: server_name
arguments.description: Human-readable name of the MCP server being audited

arguments.name: server_url
arguments.description: URL of the MCP server (e.g. https://mcp.example.com/mcp)

arguments.name: tool_names
arguments.description: Specific tool names to lint/scan -- omit to audit all tools

prompts.name: amlr_single_rulebook_workflow
prompts.title: EU AML Single Rulebook (AMLR) Workflow
prompts.description: Walk an EU obliged entity through AMLR scope, UBO mapping, cash/EDD classification, CDD policy, and readiness. AMLR applies 10 Jul 2027.

prompts.name: agent_commerce_conformance_workflow
prompts.title: Agent Commerce Cross-Protocol Conformance Workflow
prompts.description: Walk an agent commerce implementer through AP2 v0.2 mandate chain validation, ACP checkout conformance, x402 settlement modelling, and unified cross-protocol conformance. Issues a single execution_hash receipt (H4) covering AP2 + ACP + Visa TAP RFC 9421 + x402. ChainGraph Standard v0.1.

arguments.name: protocol_stack
arguments.description: Protocol stack in use (e.g. "AP2+ACP+x402", "AP2+Visa TAP", "ACP only"). Scopes conformance checks.

arguments.name: entity_type
arguments.description: Entity type (e.g. merchant, payment agent, wallet provider, acquirer). Scopes AP2 mandate type.

prompts.name: pqc_migration_workflow
prompts.title: Post-Quantum Cryptography Migration Workflow
prompts.description: End-to-end PQC migration: classify cryptographic assets (NISTIR 8547) > score HNDL quantum risk > build phased migration roadmap (FIPS 203/204/205) > score crypto-agility readiness. RSA/ECDSA/ECDH/DH deprecated 2030, disallowed 2035; DSA already disallowed. CRQC horizon ~2035.

arguments.name: org_type
arguments.description: Type of institution (e.g. bank, payment processor, asset manager, central bank). Scopes algorithm use cases.

arguments.name: urgency
arguments.description: Migration urgency (e.g. immediate -- HNDL-sensitive data at rest, planned -- standard lifecycle). Guides phase 1 prioritisation.

prompts.name: canton_capital_efficiency_workflow
prompts.title: Canton Capital Efficiency Workflow
prompts.description: Guide for assessing Canton Network pilot readiness and computing settlement-risk capital savings. Runs T503 readiness diagnostic → T504 capital optimizer → Basel 3.1 RWA → XVA/CVA → LCR/NSFR chain.

arguments.name: entity_type
arguments.description: Entity type (g_sib/regional_bank/broker_dealer/asset_manager)

prompts.name: agentic_checkout_workflow
prompts.title: Agentic Checkout Merchant Readiness Workflow
prompts.description: Walk a merchant through three-stage agentic commerce readiness: protocol selection (UCP/ACP/x402/Visa TAP), ACP/UCP product-feed conformance audit, and agent-traffic acceptance policy. Composite Policy Mandate export.
